scripts.deploy: npm run build && docker compose down --remove-orphans && NDX_GIT_REF=$(git branch --show-current) docker compose build --no-cache ndx-agent && docker compose run --rm --workdir /opt/ndx ndx-agent npm test && docker compose run --rm --workdir /workspace ndx-agent ndx --mock "create a file named tmp/ndx-docker-verify.txt with text verified" && docker compose down --remove-orphans
